king.Meaning: a male monarch who rules a kingdom

wolf.Meaning: a wild canine that hunts in packs

friend.Meaning: a person one trusts and cares for

enemy.Meaning: a person who wishes one harm

horse.Meaning: a large hooved animal used for riding

lord.Meaning: a ruler or master of a household

deer.Meaning: a hoofed grazing animal with antlers

son.Meaning: a male child of a parent

daughter.Meaning: a female child of a parent

cousin.Meaning: a child of one's aunt or uncle

stranger.Meaning: a person one does not know

fisherman.Meaning: a person who catches fish for a living

sailor.Meaning: a person who works on a ship

soldier.Meaning: a person who serves in an army

healer.Meaning: a person who treats the sick or injured

guard.Meaning: a person who protects a place or person

chief.Meaning: the leader of a group or tribe

elder.Meaning: an older, respected member of a community

hero.Meaning: a person admired for courage or great deeds

dragon.Meaning: a great winged serpent of legend

witch.Meaning: a person believed to practice magic

prophet.Meaning: a person who speaks divine messages

raven.Meaning: a large black bird known for cunning

crow.Meaning: a black bird often seen as an omen

ox.Meaning: a domesticated bovine used for labor

pig.Meaning: a domesticated animal raised for meat

spider.Meaning: an eight-legged creature that spins webs

bee.Meaning: a flying insect that makes honey

throne.Meaning: the ceremonial seat of a ruler

bone.Meaning: a rigid part of a skeleton

axe.Meaning: a bladed tool or weapon for chopping

water.Meaning: a clear liquid essential for life

sun.Meaning: the star at the center of the solar system

moon.Meaning: the natural satellite of the earth

star.Meaning: a luminous point in the night sky

ship.Meaning: a vessel for travel on water

book.Meaning: a bound set of written pages

word.Meaning: a unit of spoken or written language

name.Meaning: what a person or thing is called

gate.Meaning: a hinged barrier at an entrance

wall.Meaning: an upright structure enclosing an area

river.Meaning: a large flowing body of water

sea.Meaning: a great body of salt water

forest.Meaning: a large area covered in trees

field.Meaning: an open area of cleared land

day.Meaning: a period of light between two nights

night.Meaning: the dark period between two days

hand.Meaning: the part of the body at the end of the arm

head.Meaning: the uppermost part of the body

food.Meaning: what is eaten to sustain life

bread.Meaning: a baked food made from flour

door.Meaning: a movable barrier at an entrance

ocean.Meaning: a vast body of salt water

farm.Meaning: land used for growing crops or raising animals

roof.Meaning: the covering on top of a building

floor.Meaning: the base surface of a room

window.Meaning: an opening in a wall for light

bed.Meaning: a piece of furniture for sleeping

spoon.Meaning: a utensil for eating or serving

chain.Meaning: a series of connected metal links

key.Meaning: a tool for opening a lock

lock.Meaning: a device for securing a door

coin.Meaning: a piece of metal used as money

ring.Meaning: a circular band worn on a finger

necklace.Meaning: an ornament worn around the neck

arrow.Meaning: a projectile shot from a bow

cart.Meaning: a wheeled vehicle for carrying loads

wheel.Meaning: a circular frame that turns on an axle

boat.Meaning: a small vessel for travel on water

sail.Meaning: a sheet that catches wind to move a ship

oar.Meaning: a pole used to row a boat

anchor.Meaning: a heavy object that holds a ship in place

flag.Meaning: a piece of cloth used as a symbol

page.Meaning: a single sheet of a book

candle.Meaning: a wax stick with a wick for light

torch.Meaning: a burning stick used for light

cloud.Meaning: a visible mass of water vapor in the sky

lightning.Meaning: a flash of light from a storm

frost.Meaning: a thin coating of ice crystals

leaf.Meaning: a flat green part of a plant

root.Meaning: the part of a plant below ground

branch.Meaning: a woody stem of a tree

seed.Meaning: the part of a plant from which a new one grows

flower.Meaning: the colorful part of a plant that bears seed

fruit.Meaning: the sweet part of a plant bearing seeds

salt.Meaning: a mineral used to season food

honey.Meaning: a sweet substance made by bees

milk.Meaning: a white liquid produced by mammals

wine.Meaning: a drink made from fermented grapes

ale.Meaning: a fermented drink made from grain

wood.Meaning: the hard material of a tree

brick.Meaning: a block of baked clay used in building

coal.Meaning: a black rock burned as fuel

ladder.Meaning: a set of rungs for climbing

trail.Meaning: a rough path through wild land

border.Meaning: the edge or boundary of a land

kingdom.Meaning: a land ruled by a king or queen

nation.Meaning: a large body of people under one government

land.Meaning: the solid part of the earth's surface

soil.Meaning: the top layer of earth in which plants grow

market.Meaning: a place where goods are bought and sold

altar.Meaning: a table used for religious rites

tomb.Meaning: a place where a body is buried

soul.Meaning: the spiritual part of a person

memory.Meaning: the ability to recall the past

festival.Meaning: a day or period of celebration

song.Meaning: a piece of music with words

story.Meaning: a told or written account of events

legend.Meaning: a traditional story of uncertain truth

riddle.Meaning: a puzzling question posed for fun

prayer.Meaning: a solemn request to a deity

victory.Meaning: success in a struggle or contest

defeat.Meaning: loss in a battle or contest

journey.Meaning: an act of traveling from place to place

poverty.Meaning: the state of being extremely poor

hunger.Meaning: the need or desire for food

thirst.Meaning: the need or desire for drink

fear.Meaning: an unpleasant emotion caused by danger

courage.Meaning: the ability to face danger without fear

wisdom.Meaning: the quality of having experience and good judgment

shame.Meaning: a painful feeling of guilt or disgrace

freedom.Meaning: the power to act without restraint

walk.Meaning: to move on foot at a regular pace

give.Meaning: to hand over possession of something

go.Meaning: to move away from the speaker

sleep.Meaning: to rest with eyes closed and mind unconscious

know.Meaning: to have information in one's mind

think.Meaning: to use one's mind to consider something

take.Meaning: to get hold of and remove something

stand.Meaning: to be upright on one's feet

sing.Meaning: to make musical sounds with the voice

write.Meaning: to mark letters onto a surface

read.Meaning: to look at and understand written words

buy.Meaning: to obtain something by paying for it

sell.Meaning: to give something in exchange for payment

bring.Meaning: to carry something to a place

send.Meaning: to cause something to go somewhere

open.Meaning: to make something no longer closed

break.Meaning: to cause something to separate violently

end.Meaning: to bring something to a finish

remember.Meaning: to keep something in one's memory

understand.Meaning: to grasp the meaning of something

ask.Meaning: to put a question to someone

feel.Meaning: to experience an emotion or sensation

play.Meaning: to engage in an activity for enjoyment

work.Meaning: to do labor or a task

chase.Meaning: to pursue in order to catch

cut.Meaning: to divide with a sharp tool

dig.Meaning: to break up and move earth

draw.Meaning: to make a picture with lines

drive.Meaning: to operate and direct a vehicle

enter.Meaning: to come or go into a place

float.Meaning: to rest on the surface of a liquid

gather.Meaning: to bring together in one place

hope.Meaning: to wish for something with expectation

hunt.Meaning: to pursue and kill for food

judge.Meaning: to form an opinion after consideration

jump.Meaning: to push oneself off the ground

kiss.Meaning: to touch with the lips as a sign of affection

kneel.Meaning: to go down on one's knees

leave.Meaning: to go away from a place

lie.Meaning: to rest in a horizontal position

lift.Meaning: to raise to a higher position

measure.Meaning: to determine the size of something

melt.Meaning: to change from solid to liquid by heat

order.Meaning: to command something to be done

paint.Meaning: to apply color to a surface

plant.Meaning: to put a seed in the ground

push.Meaning: to move something away by force

reach.Meaning: to stretch out to touch something

remain.Meaning: to stay in the same place

return.Meaning: to go back to a place

reward.Meaning: to give something in recognition of effort

ride.Meaning: to travel on an animal or vehicle

save.Meaning: to keep safe from harm or loss

smile.Meaning: to form a happy facial expression

travel.Meaning: to journey from place to place

visit.Meaning: to go to see a person or place

wander.Meaning: to move about without a fixed course

warn.Meaning: to inform of danger in advance

wear.Meaning: to have clothing on the body

worship.Meaning: to show reverence for a deity

great.Meaning: large in size, extent, or degree

old.Meaning: having lived or existed for a long time

bright.Meaning: giving off or full of light

bloody.Meaning: covered in or stained with blood

clear.Meaning: easy to see through or understand

fair.Meaning: just, or pleasing to look at

gray.Meaning: of a color between black and white

loyal.Meaning: faithful to a person or cause

pleasant.Meaning: giving a sense of happy satisfaction

royal.Meaning: relating to a king or queen

silly.Meaning: showing a lack of good sense

stormy.Meaning: marked by strong winds and rain

thick.Meaning: having a large distance between opposite sides

thin.Meaning: having little distance between opposite sides
